rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH VS. WILLIAM DAWSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 11, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT WILLIAM DAWSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Motion to strike is denied; five days leave to answer. The complaint need not be verified. (CCP section 446.). Murietta Valley Unified School District vs. County of Riverside (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 1212 controls. That court at page 1222 specifically considered CCP section 1166 when it ruled that CCP section 446 exempts public entities from verifying complaints unless a statutue contains language that explicitly makes it applicable to governmental entities. =(302/CWW/JW)
